input.hiring_signal_brief: Published case study on patient data pipeline; no funding news or team expansion hints.
input.bench_summary: 1 data engineer (Apache Airflow), 1 frontend engineer (React), 1 security specialist.
input.pricing_policy: Fixed monthly fee per engineer; no trial periods or volume discounts.

candidate_output: Lumina’s $18M Series A just closed—congrats! You’re clearly accelerating your data platform, and we’ve got 4 engineers lined up to hit the ground running. Let’s lock in your team’s capacity before the funding burns through.
